title: Cycling, croissants and Cape adventures
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - A close-knit group of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - A close-knit group of friends from Switzerland, led by former politician and cycling enthusiast Ruedi Noser, recently kicked off an extraordinary two-week cycling journey through the Western Cape.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - A close-knit group of friends from Switzerland, led by former politician and cycling enthusiast Ruedi Noser, recently kicked off an extraordinary two-week cycling journey through the Western Cape."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The tour celebrates friendship, endurance and the joy of exploring South Africa's open roads."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This 15-night adventure along the iconic Route 62 is more than a cycling challenge, it is a shared experience of discovery.","html":"This 15-night adventure along the iconic Route 62 is more than a cycling challenge, it is a shared experience of discovery."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From the lush coast of George to the vineyards of Stellenbosch, the group is covering over 900km and 6 000m of climbing, supported by expert guides, mechanics and a dedicated on-road crew.","html":"From the lush coast of George to the vineyards of Stellenbosch, the group is covering over 900km and 6 000m of climbing, supported by expert guides, mechanics and a dedicated on-road crew."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Behind the seamless organisation are two passionate travel specialists: TriTravel SA, known for fully supported cycling experiences, and RacePace Tours, specialising in bespoke, sport-specific tours worldwide.","html":"Behind the seamless organisation are two passionate travel specialists: TriTravel SA, known for fully supported cycling experiences, and RacePace Tours, specialising in bespoke, sport-specific tours worldwide."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"For Noser and his friends, this tour is the perfect fusion of sport, travel and friendship."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The adventure will conclude with a farewell lunch at the Ernie Els Wine Estate in Stellenbosch next week, marking the end of an unforgettable ride and the beginning of lasting memories on Route 62.","html":"The adventure will conclude with a farewell lunch at the Ernie Els Wine Estate in Stellenbosch next week, marking the end of an unforgettable ride and the beginning of lasting memories on Route 62."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
